title: Vinna Jiss
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=CIS |image= |name=Vinna Jiss |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', in which Vinna Jiss is killed by [[Walon Vau]], to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] {{C|formerly}} **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] {{C|formerly}} ***[[Logistics battalion]] {{C|formerly}} *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Her name's Vinna Jiss. And she's a government employee.''"
"''I'm not going to like this, am I''"
"''Not when you hear she works in GAR logistics, no.|Sev and Fi Skirata, on Vinna Jiss|}} '''Vinna Jiss''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] logistics employee who worked under [[Besany Wennen]] and sided with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Biography== In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], Vinna met with [[Paxaz Izhiq]], a [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] criminal, and made a deal to exchange illegal goods in a warehouse-block between two freighters. However, she was captured by [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] [[Fi Skirata|Fi]] and [[Sev/Legends|Sev]], who interrogated her for information. After explaining everything to them, she was ultimately executed by [[Walon Vau]]. [[Jinart]] the [[Gurlanin]] later impersonated her form, not knowing that the real Vinna Jiss had been killed by Vau. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|"The other fortunate thing is that I was able to talk to Vinna Jiss's supervisor at GAR logistics as her…landlord and complain that she had skipped owing me rent. The supervisor was sympathetic and said she was an unreliable employee.|Walon Vau|}} Vinna Jiss was described by her supervisor as an undependable worker. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Vinna Jiss }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Jiss, Vinna}} [[Category:Confederacy of Independent Systems individuals]] [[Category:Coruscanti]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Grand Army of the Republic personnel]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Spies]]
